title: It's Tough Being a Little Sister

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm wandering around doing some window
shopping on my day off when...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I heard from Hishiama that you broke curfew
again.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch. Who's got the time to worry about curfew
when they're running? I don't.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Your dedication is admirable. However, you
shouldn't be running in the dark in the first place.
It's harder to distinguish your surroundings, and
even small stumbles can lead to large injuries.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What if you trip and fall? Knowing you, even if
you did injure yourself, you're not likely to call
for assistance, are you?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention there aren't many people out
after sunset. How long would it be until someone
noticed you were missing? That's why I'm saying—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hey! Wait, Brian! We're not done talking—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. I agree to go out with her for one meal, and
of course she starts nagging. Why does she turn
every little thing into a huge deal...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...?
Isn't that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? McQueen? Are you all right? You seem
really sleepy...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gasp. M-my apologies! I didn't mean to behave in such a slovenly manner.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, to tell you the truth, I got carried away with
reading some training manuals last night. Before I
knew it, it was long past the time to go to bed...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Do you want to reschedule, then? I know you
really wanted to see this movie, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: No, that won't be necessary. Thank you, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You sure? But... Oh, I know! I'll get you something
to help you stay awake!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I said I was fine... Oh, Ryan. You really
needn't worry.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Heh. Looks like I'm not the only one.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hm? Brian?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see. It seems we find ourselves in the same
predicament.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Guess we've both got it rough.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
She's always been like this. If I show even a hint of
not being in peak condition, she immediately
jumps into the role of caretaker...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...My sister's exactly the same.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. We know their actions are coming from a
place of love, but it can be overwhelming at
times.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Are you all right?! I came as soon as I heard you
were injured! If you need to go to the hospital—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It's just a minor sprain. They said it'll heal in no
time.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ah, is that so? I'm relieved to hear that. Truly, I'm
glad it wasn't something more serious!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! I know McQueen's tougher than that, but
I can't help but worry.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I feel the same way. I react before I even have
time to think about what I'm doing. It's an old
habit I can't seem to shake.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I know I have to let my sister live her life
independent of me, but it's easier said than done.
